_**Agent (claude-4.6-sonnet-medium-thinking)**_

Here is a concise summary of everything found:

---

## 1. Frontend Pages — `web/src/pages/`

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| `Login.jsx` | Standard evaluator login page |
| `ForgotPassword.jsx` | Initiates the password-reset OTP flow |
| `VerifyOtp.jsx` | OTP verification step in password reset |
| `ResetPassword.jsx` | New password entry after OTP verified |
| `ChangePassword.jsx` | Authenticated change-password (inside app) |
| `HeadEvalLogin.jsx` | Separate login entry for Head Evaluator role |
| `Dashboard.jsx` | Main evaluator dashboard showing booklet summary cards and assigned work queue |
| `Evaluate.jsx` | Core evaluation screen for a specific booklet (`/evaluate/:bookletId`) |
| `HeadEvalAssign.jsx` | Head Evaluator assignment/management view (role-protected) |
| `AdminSettings.jsx` | Admin panel for system settings (role-protected) |
| `QuestionPaperConfig.jsx` | Admin screen for configuring question papers/sections |
| `TimeReport.jsx` | Time-based report (per-evaluator and per-subject views, filterable by exam/paper/date) |
| `Profile.jsx` | User profile page |

---

## 2. API Modules — `api/src/modules/`

| Module | Files |
|---|---|
| `auth` | `auth.routes.js`, `auth.controller.js`, `auth.service.js`, `auth.repository.js` |
| `admin` | `admin.routes.js`, `admin.controller.js`, `admin.service.js`, `admin.repository.js` |
| `eval` | `eval.routes.js`, `eval.controller.js`, `eval.service.js`, `eval.repository.js` |
| `headeval` | `headeval.routes.js`, `headeval.controller.js`, `headeval.service.js`, `headeval.repository.js` |
| `scan` | `scan.routes.js`, `scan.controller.js`, `scan.service.js`, `scan.repository.js`, `files.routes.js` |
| `scanadmin` | `scanadmin.routes.js`, `scanadmin.controller.js`, `scanadmin.service.js`, `scanadmin.repository.js` |

---

## 3. Routing — `web/src/App.jsx`

React Router v6 with a `ProtectedRoute` wrapper. Layout:

- **Public:** `/login`, `/forgot-password`, `/verify-otp`, `/reset-password`, `/head-eval/login`
- **Protected (any authenticated user):** `/` (Dashboard), `/evaluate/:bookletId`, `/change-password`, `/profile`, `/reports/time`
- **Role: HeadEvaluator:** `/head-eval/assign`
- **Role: Admin:** `/admin/settings`, `/admin/question-papers`

---

## 4. Database Schema Files

Located in `docker/mysql-init/` (run in order) and mirrored under `migrations/`:

| File | Contents |
|---|---|
| `01_schema.sql` | Full DDL — two databases: **ScanningDB** (Scan_Locations, Scan_Workstations, Scan_Roles, Scan_Users, Scan_Exams, Scan_Papers, Scan_Booklets, Scan_BookletPages, Scan_ActivityLogs, Scan_SyncQueue) and **EvaluationDB** (Roles, Eval_Locations, Users, Eval_Exams, Eval_Papers, Eval_QuestionScheme, Eval_Booklets, Eval_BookletMetadata, AllocationQueue, Evaluations, EvaluationDetails, Eval_PageVisitLog, VarianceRecords, OverrideLogs, Eval_AttendanceLog, ActivityLogs) + all indexes |
| `02_seed.sql` | Seed data |
| `03_user_lifecycle.sql` | User lifecycle additions (OTP, password reset, etc.) |
| `04_monitoring.sql` | Monitoring/audit additions |
| `05_scan_templates.sql` | Scan template additions |
| `06_session_geo.sql` | Session geo/IP tracking additions |
| `07_question_sets.sql` | Question sets additions |

A full consolidated DDL also lives at `docs/Scanning_Evaluation_Full_Production_MySQL_DDL.sql`.

---

## 5. PDF Generation/Processing Code

There is **no PDF generation** code — only **PDF reading/parsing**:

- **`api/src/middleware/upload.js`** — multer middleware that accepts PDF or image uploads for question papers (up to 50 MB), storing them under `question_papers/`.
- **`api/src/modules/admin/admin.service.js`** (lines ~166–209) — uses the `pdf-parse` npm library (v2.x class-based API: `new PDFParse({ data }).load()`) to extract text from an uploaded question paper PDF, used to auto-populate question section details. Handles the edge case of scanned/image-only PDFs with a warning. The installed packages are `pdf-parse` and `pdfjs-dist` (the latter is a dependency of `pdf-parse`).

No server-side PDF *generation* library (e.g. Puppeteer, PDFKit, wkhtmltopdf) is present anywhere in the source code.
